title: Bridge Essay: Application of convolutional neural networks for prediction of disinfection by-p

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Application, of, convolutional, neural, networks.

**Application of convolutional neural networks for prediction of disinfection by-products.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 35022442. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-021-03881-w. Fluorescence spectroscopy can provide high-level chemical characterization and quantification that is suitable for use in online process monitoring and control. However, the high-dimensionality of excitation-emission matrices and superposition of underlying signals is amajor challenge to implementation. Herein the use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is investigated to interpret fluorescence spectra and predict the formation of disinfection by-products during drinking water treatment. Us
